name: Estrogen Balance Stack
summary: Estrogen Balance Stack is a low-evidence compound profile in the workbook. Keep it in research-hold until PMID/source, safety, and dosage fields are reviewed.
description: Estrogen Balance Stack is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Hormonal Health. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Hormonal Signaling Context, not treatment claims.
conditions: not enough human evidence for a consumer recommendation
buying_criteria: Do not promote as a general consumer product
keep as research/reference unless human supplement evidence and safety context are added
